reason:
<one-sentence reason>

The PR title claims to bump `@expo/metro` to version 54.1.0 for `metro@0.83.2`, but the diff shows only dependency version updates in package.json files and corresponding code changes to adapt to the new metro API (like import path changes from `.flow` to non-flow types and function signature adjustments), with no changes to actual non-test code that would plausibly affect the specific code path that the version bump is meant to fix.
